{"code":"(def open-prs-with-many-additions
  (->> (github_pull_requests {:state "open"})
       (filter #(> (:additions %) 400))
       (filter #(nil? (:closes_linear %)))))

;; Count by repository
(def counts-by-repo (->> open-prs-with-many-additions
